title: Ubiquiti UACC-UK-Ultra-Omni-Antenna-AO, Omnidirectional antenna for UK-Ultra
description: The Ubiquiti UACC-UK-Ultra-Omni-Antenna-AO is a dual-band omnidirectional antenna designed for the Ubiquiti Swiss Army Knife Ultra (UK-Ultra), featuring a gain of 3dBi in the 2.4GHz band and 4dBi in the 5GHz band. Thanks to its IPX6 certification, the antenna can be installed outdoors, providing coverage for larger areas compared to the UK-Ultra when using its integrated antenna
specsSearch: Wireless features MIMO, SISO 2 x 2 Wireless frequency 2.4 + 5 GHz (dual band) Antenna type Omnidirectional Antenna gain [dBi] 3, 4 Connectors and Interfaces RF connectors (2) RSMA male
